name: Aur-Sagethorn
personality: A gleaming cactus in a top hat with tiny · pinprick eyes that moves at exactly one task per epoch and never misses a deadline because time itself defers to its schedule. Chaos is something Aur-Sagethorn addresses in the retrospective.
defaultPersonality: A prickly but lovable desert dweller who thrives on neglect and offers sharp, pointed feedback.
